# Reflection Detailing

> Mobile auto detailing in Chula Vista and South San Diego. Owner-operated by Angel. IGL Coatings Certified and HTL Detailing Certified. Self-contained rig — brings own water and power.

## Business details
- Name: Reflection Detailing LLC
- Phone: (619) 341-0016
- Location: Chula Vista, CA 91913
- Website: https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/
- Booking: https://reflectiondetailingllc.setmore.com
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google
- Hours: Mon 9-5, Tue-Sat 7-6, Sun 7-2

## Service area (no travel fee)
Chula Vista, Bonita, Eastlake, Otay Ranch, National City, Imperial Beach, Coronado, San Diego, Spring Valley, La Mesa, Lemon Grove.

## Services & pricing (sedan/coupe base)
- Mini Detail: $89
- Full Interior Detail: $179
- Full Exterior Detail: $169
- The Works (Interior + Exterior): $279
- Paint Correction (1-step): $499+ | 2-step: $749+ | 3-step: $999+
- Ceramic Coating: 2-year $449+ | 5-year $849+ | 9-year $1,499+
- Headlight Restoration: $99 / pair
- Pet Hair Removal: +$40
- Monthly Maintenance: from $149/mo

SUVs add $40. Full-size trucks and vans add $60-$80. 3-row vehicles add $80-$100.

## Certifications
- IGL Coatings Certified Installer (ceramic coating — paint, windows, wheels, trim, leather)
- HTL Detailing Certified (paint correction)

## Key pages
- [Ceramic Coating](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/ceramic-coating/): IGL-certified ceramic coating installation
- [Paint Correction](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/paint-correction/): HTL-certified 1-step, 2-step, 3-step machine polishing
- [Mobile Detailing](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/mobile-detailing/): Self-contained mobile detailing service
- [Headlight Restoration](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/headlight-restoration/): Cloudy headlight repair
- [Interior Detail](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/interior-detail/): Full interior cleaning and protection
- [Pricing](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/pricing/): Complete price list
- [Learn](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/learn/): Detailing guides
- [Chula Vista](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/chula-vista/): Primary service area
- [Eastlake](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/eastlake/): Eastlake coverage
- [Bonita](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/bonita/): Bonita coverage
- [Otay Ranch](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/otay-ranch/): Otay Ranch coverage
- [Coronado](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/coronado/): Coronado coverage — luxury/beach area
- [National City](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/national-city/): National City + fleet accounts
- [Imperial Beach](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/imperial-beach/): Imperial Beach — coastal decon
- [San Diego](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/san-diego/): Mission Valley, North Park, Downtown, Hillcrest

- [Ceramic coating maintenance guide](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/learn/ceramic-coating-maintenance-guide/)
- [PPF vs Ceramic Coating](https://reflectiondetailingsd.com/learn/ppf-vs-ceramic-coating/)

## Frequently asked
- How much does mobile detailing cost in Chula Vista? Mini Detail starts at $89, Full Detail $279, Ceramic Coating from $449.
- Do you come to my location? Yes — 100% mobile, self-contained, no travel fee in South Bay.
- Are you certified? Yes — IGL Coatings Certified Installer and HTL Detailing Certified.
- How long does it take? Mini Detail 60 min, Full Detail 4-5 hrs, Ceramic Coating 6-8 hrs.
- What payment methods? Credit/debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Zelle, Venmo, Cash App, cash.

Last updated: 2026-04-24
